mapper.sql:
AA.PTN_SEQ , AA.PTN_NAME , AA.NATION , AA.PTN_LIC
, AA.PAGE_URL , AA.LOGO_FILE_ID , AA.DEL_YN , AA.RGTR AS RGTR_SEQ , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DATE , AA.CHNR AS CHNR_SEQ , TO_CHAR(AA.CHNG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DATE
, AA.NATION_NAME , AA.YT_URL , AA.PTN_INTRO , AA.RECRUIT_YN

sql.if: AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(AA.PTN_NAME), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(AA.PTN_LIC), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' )

if.test: recruitYn != null and recruitYn != '' and recruitYn != 'All'

choose.otherwise: AND ( AA.PTN_NAME LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') OR AA.PTN_LIC LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') )

mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.partner.mapper.PartnerDAO.getPtnNmList */
SELECT AA.PTN_SEQ , AA.PTN_NAME , AA.PTN_LIC FROM T_PARTNER_INF AA
